text: You will hear a talk on how to get the best from your camcorder, Choose SEVEN answers from the list and write the correct letter, A-J, next to questions 1-7 in exercise 8.
If you're going to take film-making seriously, you need to learn how to get the best from your

explanation: یک دستگاه الکترونیکی قابل حمل برای ضبط ویدئو و صدا.

text: . Many people use camcorders these days, to make short videos of their friends and family, and often people just use the

explanation: تنظیماتی که دوربین به صورت هوشمند و بدون دخالت کاربر انجام می‌دهد.

text: . These work well enough for those types of

explanation: اشاره به رویدادها یا زمان‌های خاص دارد.

text: , but if you want to take a more professional approach for the production of your short film, you should have some knowledge of the camcorder's

explanation: در مقابل حالت خودکار، کاربر کنترل کامل روی تنظیمات لنز و نور دارد.

text:
too.
In this tutorial I will start by discussing three of the most basic functions: the focus, the iris and the zoom. The focus control is usually the

explanation: حلقه‌ای دور لنز که با چرخاندن آن وضوح تصویر را تنظیم می‌کنند.

text: at the front of the lens, well certainly with professional cameras. It's a particularly useful function if used correctly. The ring turns

for a more distant focus and clockwise for a closer focus.
Next, I will talk about the

explanation: بخشی که میزان باز و بسته بودن دهانه لنز را برای ورود نور کنترل می‌کند.

text: . This is also located on the lens. It manages how much light appears through the lens, through the adjustable opening called the

explanation: دریچه‌ای در لنز که نور از آن عبور می‌کند تا به سنسور برسد.

text:
. As you let more light into the shot, it naturally becomes brighter.
Finally, I will talk about the zoom function. Many people use this function and it's often over-used! Used in

explanation: انجام کاری به اندازه کافی و نه بیش از حد.

text: , however, this very popular feature can be a really useful tool. It moves your

explanation: زاویه دید یا نحوه نمایش اشیا در تصویر.

text: closer or further away from your chosen subject. I would advise, however, that whilst shooting a long zoom, you use a

explanation: وسیله‌ای با سه پایه برای ثابت نگه داشتن دوربین و جلوگیری از لرزش.

text: Listen carefully, as some of the options in the box are

explanation: در آزمون‌ها، گزینه‌هایی که شبیه پاسخ درست هستند اما برای فریب دادن طراحی شده‌اند.
